# NOVARO — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> NOVARO is a premium fashion e-commerce brand with a sleek, international identity inspired by leading fashion retailers like Zara, Bershka, and Terminal X. The brand exudes modern sophistication through a minimalist black, white, and gray aesthetic. It operates as a bilingual (Hebrew RTL and English) online store offering men's and women's clothing, with a full shopping experience including product galleries, size and color selection, cart management, and a custom checkout flow that generates unique order numbers and sends WhatsApp order confirmations. Payment is handled via Israeli platforms Bit and PayBox, with dedicated customer support contacts.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover NOVARO&#39;s minimalist fashion for men &amp; women. Shop curated collections inspired by global trends, from tommy hilfiger clothing to streetwear. Start styling now.

### About Us
https://example.com/about
Behind NOVARO&#39;s sleek monochrome aesthetic lies a passion for modern design. Learn how we curate premium men&#39;s clothing stores essentials with an international edge.

### New Arrivals
https://example.com/new-arrivals
Be first to wear NOVARO&#39;s newest drops. From oversized silhouettes to refined tommy hilfiger clothing alternatives, refresh your look with our freshest arrivals.

### Sale
https://example.com/sale
Limited-time sale on curated men&#39;s and women&#39;s collections. Grab iconic tommy hilfiger clothing styles and streetwear essentials before they vanish.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Need style advice or order support? Connect with NOVARO&#39;s team for personalized help on men&#39;s clothing stores picks, sizing, and seamless shopping.

### Journal
https://example.com/journal
Dive into NOVARO&#39;s journal for expert takes on oversized looks, Bugy culture, and elevating tommy hilfiger clothing staples. Read, get inspired, shop the vibe.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About NOVARO
NOVARO is a premium fashion e-commerce brand with a sleek, international identity inspired by leading fashion retailers like Zara, Bershka, and Terminal X. The brand exudes modern sophistication through a minimalist black, white, and gray aesthetic. It operates as a bilingual (Hebrew RTL and English) online store offering men's and women's clothing, with a full shopping experience including product galleries, size and color selection, cart management, and a custom checkout flow that generates unique order numbers and sends WhatsApp order confirmations. Payment is handled via Israeli platforms Bit and PayBox, with dedicated customer support contacts.

## Target Audience
- Fashion-conscious shoppers seeking premium clothing for men and women

## Industry
Fashion E-commerce

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
- Products (JSON): https://example.com/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://example.com/product-feed.xml
